items.title_en: SoftBank shares surge over 16% as Japan tech stock-fueled rally lifts Nikkei 225 to record highs

items.desc_en: The benchmark Nikkei 225 surged over 5% to a record high as Japan reopened after extended Golden Week holidays.
items.desc_zh: 随着日本黄金周假期延长后重新开放，基准日经 225 指数飙升逾 5%，创下历史新高。

items.desc_zh: 亚太市场上涨，摆脱了中东新一轮紧张局势的影响。

items.desc_zh: 派拉蒙同意支付 Netflix 终止费，但这笔费用将记入 WBD 的账簿中，直至交易完成。

items.title_en: Snap issues cautious guidance as Perplexity deal ends, Middle East 'geopolitical situation' causes uncertainty

items.title_en: Ted Turner, outspoken founder of CNN, dies at 87
items.title_zh: CNN 直言不讳的创始人特德·特纳去世，享年 87 岁
items.desc_en: Ted Turner, the brash sportsman and entrepreneur whose ambition and instincts led to a media empire that included groundbreaking news network CNN, has died.

items.title_en: Berkshire-owned distribution giant to deploy driverless big rigs across U.S. Sun Belt

items.title_en: CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87

items.title_zh: 俄罗斯无视乌克兰单方面停火并袭击幼儿园
items.desc_en: Ukraine's president says Russia has "spurned the ceasefire" and Kyiv is deciding on further action to take.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，俄罗斯“拒绝了停火”，基辅正在决定采取进一步行动。

items.title_en: German police raid neo-Nazi criminal youth groups
items.title_zh: 德国警方突袭新纳粹青年犯罪组织
items.desc_en: Police search locations in 12 states, mainly in the East and South of the country in what prosecutors say is a targeted raid.
items.desc_zh: 警方搜查了 12 个州的地点，主要是在该国东部和南部，检察官称这是一次有针对性的突击搜查。

items.title_en: China calls for Strait to be reopened 'as soon as possible' in Iran talks
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁在伊朗谈判中“尽快”重新开放海峡
items.desc_en: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
items.desc_zh: 王毅正在与伊朗外长阿拉格奇举行会谈。阿拉格奇是战后首次访华。

items.title_en: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
items.title_zh: 要么留下来，要么冒险走上“死亡之路”——被困在前线城市的乌克兰平民
items.desc_en: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰奥列什基市的人们表示，他们的新鲜食品或药品供应已经被切断了几个月。

items.title_en: Oil prices ease as US pauses Project Freedom to seek deal with Iran
items.title_zh: 美国暂停自由计划以寻求与伊朗达成协议，油价下跌
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.
items.desc_zh: 经过几天的升级后，唐纳德·特朗普总统提出了美国和伊朗达成协议的希望。

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_en: Vivek Ramaswamy wins Republican nomination for Ohio governor
items.title_zh: 维韦克·拉马斯瓦米赢得俄亥俄州州长共和党提名
items.desc_en: He spent much of the race criticising the state's response to the Covid-19 pandemic led by the Democrat nominee.
items.desc_zh: 他在竞选的大部分时间里批评该州对民主党候选人领导的Covid-19大流行的反应。

items.title_en: 'Nothing will bring back my son': How 10 minutes of bombing by Israel shattered lives in Lebanon
items.title_zh: “没有什么能带回我的儿子”：以色列十分钟的轰炸如何摧毁了黎巴嫩的生活
items.desc_en: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.
items.desc_zh: 炸弹于下午 14 点 15 分开始落下，给全国带来混乱和破坏。

items.desc_en: Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.
items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。
